backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the hostel data model (with room sharing/pricing details) and sample hostel data initialization, using blob storage mixin and migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts hostel records from an old variant-based category type (#girls, #boys, #coLiving) to plain text strings ('Girls', 'Boys', 'Co-Living').
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a high-confidence fix for the category filter functionality on the Home page, listing the affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing each component, page, hook, and config file's purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, geo tags, JSON-LD structured data schemas for WebSite and LodgingBusiness, targeting Hyderabad hostel searches.
frontend/public/googlee7577b039261c25d.h: Google Search Console site verification file for the hosteladdas.icp0.io domain.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the sitemap URL.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing four public URLs (home, privacy, disclaimer, seo-guide) with last-modified dates and priority values.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining all application routes (home, hostel detail, add/edit hostel, privacy, disclaimer, seo-guide) under a shared Layout root route.
A collapsible advanced filters panel component that allows users to filter hostels by price range (min/max) and sharing type (single, double, triple, four), displaying an active filter count badge.
frontend/src/components/CategoryFilter.t: A button-group filter component for selecting hostel categories (All, Girls, Boys, Co-Living) with highlighted active state and gradient styling.
frontend/src/components/HostelCard.tsx: A clickable card component that displays a hostel's image, name, address, contact, category badge, and price range, navigating to the hostel detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/HostelGrid.tsx: A responsive grid layout component that renders a list of HostelCard components, with loading spinner and empty-state fallback UI.
frontend/src/components/HostelMap.tsx: A canvas-like map component that plots hostel markers on a stylized Hyderabad map using normalized lat/lng coordinates, with color-coded category markers and a legend.
frontend/src/components/ImageGallery.tsx: An image gallery component with a main display, previous/next navigation arrows, keyboard support, image counter, and clickable thumbnails for multi-image browsing.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links, an outlet for page content, and a footer with copyright, policy links, and a caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/MapLocationPicke: A React component that renders an interactive Google Maps picker with autocomplete search, allowing users to select a location by clicking the map or searching, then returns the address and coordinates to the parent.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input component with a search icon and a clear button that appears when the input has a value.
frontend/src/components/SeoInfoBanner.ts: A dismissible informational banner that guides users to submit their site to Google Search Console for faster indexing, including a collapsible step-by-step guide; dismissed state is persisted in localStorage.
frontend/src/components/SortControls.tsx: A dropdown select component for sorting hostels by price, name, or location, exposing a typed SortOption and notifying the parent on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook that manage DFINITY AuthClient lifecycle, exposing login/logout functions and identity state with delegation validity checks.
frontend/src/hooks/useMutations.ts: Defines useAddHostel and useUpdateHostel React Query mutation hooks that call the backend actor to create or update a hostel and invalidate relevant query caches on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks (useGetAllHostels, useGetHostelsByCategory, useGetHostel) for fetching hostel data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet that defines a warm color palette (terracotta, sage, amber) with CSS custom properties for both light and dark themes, including category-specific colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AddHostel.tsx: Form page for adding a new hostel listing, including fields for name, category, description, address, owner contact, image URLs, room sharing options with prices, and a map location picker. Validates inputs and submits via the useAddHostel mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/Disclaimer.tsx: Static disclaimer page for the Hostel Finder site covering liability, user-generated content, third-party links, and no-professional-advice notices. Includes JSON-LD breadcrumb structured data for SEO.
frontend/src/pages/EditHostel.tsx: Edit page that loads an existing hostel by ID and allows updating its room capacity and pricing details across five sharing tiers. Submits changes via the useUpdateHostel mutation and redirects to the hostel detail page on success.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page that fetches all hostels and filters/sorts them by category, search query, price range, and sharing type using memoized logic. Renders category filters, search bar, advanced filters, sort controls, a hostel grid, and a map view.
frontend/src/pages/HostelDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single hostel that displays an image gallery, category badge, room sharing/pricing options, address, owner contact, and a map. Falls back to category-appropriate placeholder images when no images are provided.
frontend/src/pages/Privacy.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page with sections covering data collection, usage, storage, user rights, and third-party services, including JSON-LD breadcrumb structured data for SEO.
frontend/src/pages/SeoGuide.tsx: Renders a step-by-step SEO guide page explaining how to get the Hostel Addas site indexed and ranked on Google, with reusable Section, Tip, and CodeBlock components and JSON-LD breadcrumb markup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color tokens (warm palette, category-specific colors), border radius, fonts, animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks overall project state (version 29) for a Hyderabad hostel listing site, documenting existing features, known issues (Google indexing, category filtering), and architectural notes.
